agents.name: Alert Correlator
agents.description: Ingests SAP Cloud ALM and Azure Monitor alerts — correlates noise from SAP system events, maintenance windows, and batch processing to suppress false positives before they reach the service desk.

agents.name: RCA Engine
agents.description: Traverses SAP dependency graph — from SAP Cloud ALM CIs through S/4HANA basis layer to root cause. Specialised in SAP PCE architecture: work process saturation, HANA memory pressure, MDG workflow bottlenecks.

agents.name: Remediation Agent
agents.description: Executes SAP-specific remediation runbooks — SM37 job rescheduling, Fiori cache flush, RSSM delta pointer reset, K2 workflow restart. All actions logged to ServiceNow automatically.

agents.name: Change Validator
agents.description: Validates SAP changes and service requests — automated SoD checking via SAP GRC API, role assignment eligibility, MDG master data validation. Auto-approves standard requests; escalates sensitive changes to human approvers.

agents.name: Capacity Planner
agents.description: Monitors SAP PCE resource trends — S/4HANA WP pool utilisation, HANA memory forecasting, MDG queue growth trajectory, BW/4HANA memory during month-end peaks. Raises predictive alerts before SLA breach.

agents.name: Log Analyzer
agents.description: Analyses SAP system logs — SM21 system log, BW process chain logs, K2 workflow logs, ServiceNow ticket history — to identify patterns and recurring failure modes for continuous improvement.
